Brand Philosophy

We Don't Build Bodies.
We Forge Legends.

At ECLYPSE, training is more than exercise — it is a relentless commitment to becoming the ultimate version of yourself. We stripped away the commercial fluff, the bright fluorescent distractions, and the casual gym culture. What remains is a dark, high-octane sanctuary built for raw execution, precision coaching, and measurable physical evolution.

Raw Execution

No fluorescent lights, no distractions, no casual gym culture — just a dark, high-octane sanctuary built for the work itself.

Precision Coaching

Every session is engineered, not improvised. Coaching built on biomechanics and force production, not guesswork.

Measurable Evolution

Your progress is tracked, not assumed. What gets measured at ECLYPSE is what gets forged into results.

The Eclypse Experience

Six systems.
One machine.

Every zone at ECLYPSE is purpose-built and climate-tuned for a single discipline — nothing multipurpose, nothing shared.

Heavy iron. Elite mechanics.

Strength Arena

Equipped with competition-grade barbells, custom-molded plates, and ergonomic platforms engineered for maximum power output and structural safety.

Data-driven tracking.

Performance Lab

Utilize advanced biometric analysis, velocity-based training trackers, and metabolic testing to eliminate guesswork from your progress.

System reset.

Recovery Chamber

Maximize your output by optimizing your downtime. Features localized cryotherapy, infrared saunas, and compression therapy.

Fuel the machine.

Nutrition Studio

Personalized macro management plans and a premium, clean-ingredient custom shake bar calibrated to fuel your specific metabolic rate.

Master architects.

Elite Coaching

Direct, 1-on-1 access to coaches holding specialized certifications in biomechanics, sports science, and high-performance adaptation.

Connect with the driven.

Community Lounge

A high-end workspace and networking hub equipped with fiber-fast Wi-Fi, designed for founders, athletes, and high-performers who live on the grind.

The Architects

Meet The Architects
Of Transformation.

Every ECLYPSE coach is a specialist first — biomechanics, Olympic lifting, or elite conditioning.

Not Facility Access. Investment.

Every membership includes direct, 1-on-1 access to a dedicated coach — programming, nutrition, and accountability built around you, not a class schedule.

MV

Marcus Vance

Head of Biomechanics

M.S. Exercise Science. Leads force production analysis and structural coaching across the Strength Arena.

ER

Elena Rostova

Olympic Weightlifting Coach

Neuromuscular specialist coaching technical lifting and rate-of-force development.

CJ

Coach Jax

High-Intensity Performance

Leads metabolic conditioning — engineered intensity for measurable output, not exhaustion for its own sake.

Transformations Speak
Louder Than Words.

Community

You Don't Join A Gym.
You Join A Tribe.

Culture isn't manufactured; it is chosen. At ECLYPSE, you train alongside founders, creatives, builders, and elite athletes. No egos, no performative social media filming — just collective momentum, shared grit, and an environment that demands your absolute best every single day.
